_prompt_instructions:
Copy the following prompt into Gemini, GPT-4, or Claude. Replace [TOPIC] with your research topic. The AI will fill all fields below. Upload the resulting JSON to VibeScholar.

---
PROMPT:
I have a research project about [TOPIC]. Fill the following JSON template completely. Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown fences.
- For 'overview' sections, write substantive content (not placeholders).
- For 'milestones', create 4-6 milestones with realistic week ranges.
- For 'vc_steps', create 6-10 Vibe Coding steps (implementation tasks).
- For 'vr_steps', create 6-10 Vibe Research steps (literature/experiment tasks).
- Each step needs: title, description, acceptance criteria, section label.
---
